description.value: Aura strong conjuration; CL 15th; Slot ring; Price 90,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This white gold ring is generally set with a large green sapphire. When worn, the ring continually allows a living wearer to heal 1 point of damage per round and an equal amount of nonlethal damage. In addition, the wearer is immune to bleed damage while wearing a ring of regeneration. If the wearer loses a limb, an organ, or any other body part while wearing this ring, the ring regenerates it as the spell regenerate. In either case, only damage taken while wearing the ring is regenerated. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Forge Ring; Spells regenerate; Cost 45,000 gp
